name: NavLink
searchText: navlink navigation link @mantine/core /core/nav-link active autocontrast children childrenoffset color defaultopened description disablerightsectionrotation disabled keepmounted label leftsection nowrap onchange onclick onkeydown opened rightsection

props.name: active
props.description: Determines whether the link should have active styles

props.name: autoContrast
props.description: If set, adjusts text color based on background color for filled variant

props.name: childrenOffset
props.description: Controls indentation of nested NavLink components, key of theme.spacing or any valid CSS value

props.name: color
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color to control active styles

props.name: defaultOpened
props.description: Uncontrolled nested items collapse initial state

props.name: description
props.description: Link description, displayed below the label

props.name: disableRightSectionRotation
props.description: If set, right section will not be rotated when collapse is opened

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set, disabled styles will be added to the root element

props.name: keepMounted
props.description: If set to false, child NavLinks are unmounted when collapsed

props.name: leftSection
props.description: Section displayed on the left side of the label

props.name: noWrap
props.description: If set, label and description are truncated with ellipsis instead of wrapping

props.name: onClick
props.description: Called when the root element is clicked

props.name: onKeyDown
props.description: Called on keydown of the root element

props.name: rightSection
props.description: Section displayed on the right side of the label
